notes: OFARM2 implementation package: Kernel/Core/Platform packaging profile, Slovenia FFS pilot definition, extracted contracts with digest manifests, candidate contracts, and inherited conformance fixtures.
Self-contained and designed to be lifted into a standalone repository. Reference copies inside the package are verbatim, read-only, non-normative duplicates; canonical authority is unchanged.
New schemas are candidate artifacts per Constitution RC2.1 section 6.16; nothing here is a currentness action or contract promotion. This metadata file is not active law.
authorityBoundary: Folder status metadata is not active law and does not override active OFARM authority.
